MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Javier Cruz, Defendant in Propra Persona

After hearing, PLAINTIFF ECONOMY FOODS, INC.'S Application For Writ Of Attachment is GRANTED as to PALO ALTO FUEGO,INC. AND JAVIER CRUZ in the amount of $14,061. The undertaking is set in the amount of $10,000.00. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.
